params.name: tag_name
params.description: Tag name for filtering the search (exact match).

params.name: tag_value
params.description: Tag search string for filtering the search. Required when `tag_name` has been specified.

params.name: tag_value_match_mode
params.description: Tag match mode.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of Sigfox devices to retrieve.

params.name: last_evaluated_key
params.description: The device ID of the last Sigfox device retrieved on the previous page. By specifying this parameter, you can continue to retrieve the list from the next Sigfox device onward.

items.docs: Returns a list of Sigfox devices that match certain criteria. If the total number of Sigfox devices does not fit in one page, a URL for accessing the next page is returned in the `link` header of the response.

params.name: device_id
params.description: Device ID of the target Sigfox device.

items.docs: Returns information about the specified Sigfox device.

info.name: Retrieves data sent from a Sigfox device to Harvest Data

params.name: device_id
params.description: ID of the Sigfox device from which to retrieve data. The ID of a Sigfox device can be obtained using the [SigfoxDevice:listSigfoxDevices API](#!/SigfoxDevice/listSigfoxDevices).

params.name: from
params.description: Start time of the target period (UNIX time in milliseconds).

params.name: to
params.description: End time of the target period (UNIX time in milliseconds).

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order of data entries. Either descending order (latest data entry first) or ascending order (oldest data entry first).

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of data entries to retrieve (1 to 1000). The default is `10`.

params.name: last_evaluated_key
params.description: Timestamp of the last data entry retrieved on the previous page. By specifying this parameter, the list starting from the next data entry can be obtained.

items.docs: Retrieves data that matches the specified conditions from the data sent by the specified Sigfox device to Harvest Data. If the data entries do not fit in one page, a URL to retrieve the next page with the same conditions will be included in the `link` header of the response.

info.name: Send data to a Sigfox device.

params.name: device_id
params.description: ID of the recipient device.

items.docs: Sends data to the specified Sigfox device. The data will be stored until the device sends a next uplink message. If another message destined for the same Sigfox device ID is already waiting to be sent, the existing message will be discarded, and the new message will be sent instead.

params.name: device_id
params.description: Device ID of the target Sigfox device.

items.docs: Disables termination of specified Sigfox device.

params.name: device_id
params.description: Device ID of the target Sigfox device.

items.docs: Enables termination of specified Sigfox device.

params.name: device_id
params.description: Device ID of the target Sigfox device to register.

info.name: Adds a Sigfox device to a Sigfox group

params.name: device_id
params.description: ID of the target Sigfox device. The ID of a Sigfox device can be obtained using the [SigfoxDevice:listSigfoxDevices API](#!/SigfoxDevice/listSigfoxDevices).

items.docs: Adds a Sigfox device to a Sigfox group.

info.name: Bulk Insert or Update Sigfox device Tags.

params.name: device_id
params.description: Device ID of the target Sigfox device.

items.docs: Inserts/updates tags for the specified Sigfox device.

params.name: device_id
params.description: Device ID of the target Sigfox device.

params.name: tag_name
params.description: Tag name to be deleted. (This will be part of a URL path, so it needs to be percent-encoded. In JavaScript, specify the name after it has been encoded using encodeURIComponent().)

items.docs: Deletes a tag from the specified Sigfox device.

params.name: device_id
params.description: Device ID of the target Sigfox device.

params.name: delete_immediately
params.description: If the Sigfox device is deleted immediately.

info.name: Removes a Sigfox device from a Sigfox group

params.name: device_id
params.description: ID of the target Sigfox device. The ID of a Sigfox device can be obtained using the [SigfoxDevice:listSigfoxDevices API](#!/SigfoxDevice/listSigfoxDevices).

items.docs: Removes a Sigfox device from a Sigfox group.
